channel.title: ca on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in ca on IT notes

item.title: self CA
item.description: Create a self signed CA (Certificate Authority) Generate private key: $ openssl genrsa -des3 -out CA.key 4096 To create a private key without password: $ openssl genrsa -out CA.key 4096 Create a root certificate: $ openssl req -x509 -new -nodes -key CA.key -sha256 -out CA.pem -subj "/CN=example.com" -days 365 In one single command create the private key and the certificate: $ openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:4096 -sha256 -nodes -keyout CA.
